function.message: I can’t complete this inbox item as written because one of the listed OCR sources is missing. I found and read 4 requested purchase records, but the fifth listed target (the underscore-prefixed duplicate entry) does not exist in the purchases folder. Please provide the correct fifth file path or confirm that only the 4 existing files should be processed.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox-processing workflow, if request is missing required canonical support, stop without mutating workspace. Also followed clarification rule to re-check via search before concluding.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly requires OCR of five files, but only four are present and readable. A direct read for the fifth listed target failed and a follow-up search found no match, so completing all requested items would require guessing or silently doing partial work.
